name: agents
description: Shared agent skills for reusable proof, PR, docs, prompt, testing, and maintenance workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Shared skills and tooling for Codex projects
interface.longDescription: agents provides reusable skills for prompt writing, proof-of-work, dependency upgrades, Attractor pipelines, cross-agent consensus, documentation maintenance, testing coverage triage, customer feedback triage, and maintenance scouting.
defaultPrompt: Use agents skills in this repository.
Improve this prompt using the agents prompt-writing skill.
Drive this PR through proof, auto-merge, and merge readiness.
Review this design with Claude Code / Codex consensus.
Fold recent worklogs and reviews into durable docs.
